data.name: Synthie Maker
data.detailed_description:
Create • Play • Save • Mix your Synthie


Synthie Maker is a stylish 18+ character creator built for fast sculpting and bold aesthetics. Shape your Synthie from overall silhouette to micro facial detail, then fine-tune the art style from anime cell-shading to semi-real using shaders and post-FX. Pose, animate, stage her in synth-vapor scenes - and save the result as one shareable PNG Character Card.

PNG Character Cards (the “one file” magic)

  • Save your Synthie as a single PNG image that also contains her full preset data.

  • Trade cards with friends, collect favorites, and build a library.

  • Mix & match parts from different cards to quickly prototype new looks.

A creator that actually goes deep

  • Face & body sculpting with a huge blendshape library - from full presets to micro-details.

  • Skin & style control: matcaps, skin details, makeup, eye customization, and shader tuning for hair/clothes/skin.

  • Wardrobe & accessories with transform controls (move/rotate/scale) for fine positioning.

  • Horns, tails, elf ears, glasses, chains… plus lots of style archetypes to explore (cyber, goth, fantasy, kemono, anime, semi-real).

Pose, animate, bring her to life

  • 261 poses (standing / sitting / kneeling / lying) + motion blending to add life to “static” shots.

  • 67 animations total - including 27 dance and 40 sex animations with speed control.

  • Camera controls (orbit + FOV) and deep post-FX tuning (bloom, outlines, dithering, chromatic aberration, etc.) for that synth-vapor punch.

18+ interactive controls

  • Interactive sex toy controls (manual/auto movement, speed, scale, drag-to-position)

  • Moan/voice variations with intensity & frequency controls, synced to motion speed

  • Face/expression systems: head controls, layered expressions, “silly face” mode, and extra facial shapes for expressive shots

Synth-vapor scenes

  • 25 scene presets with their own sky vibes (including minimalist and “synth beach” variants).

  • full Lighting + atmosphere controls: fog, sky/scattering feel, clouds, and more.

data.short_description: Build your perfect Synthie waifu in a neon vaporworld. Deep face/body sculpting, anime→semi-real style dial, poses, dances and 18+ animations - saved as one shareable PNG Character Card. Create • Play • Save • Mix.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 瑞典文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 匈牙利文, 泰文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64 bit
  • 處理器: AMD Ryzen 5 / Intel i5 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon™ RX 590 / NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060 or better
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64 bit
  • Processor: AMD Ryzen 5 / Intel i5 or better
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ RX 590 / NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060 or better
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
